validating_credit.description:
Parent is blocked in this state while the credit_check child
runs synchronously. The child's terminal determines which
next_event fires.

ready_for_underwriting.description: credit check passed, waiting for underwriting submission

approved.description: underwriting approved, offer ready for disbursement

__invoking_submit_for_underwriting_from_.description: Synthetic intermediate state for event-invoke on underwriting.yaml

pom.description:
End-to-end loan application as a single parent workflow that uses
BOTH composition primitives:
- state invoke on "validating_credit" (synchronous credit check while
  the parent is blocked in that state);
- event invoke on "submit_for_underwriting" (the parent's transition
  runs an underwriting child workflow that decides the next state).

This is the multi-primitive showcase: the same parent orchestrates a
state-driven sub-workflow and an event-driven sub-workflow, both
synchronously, both with structured input and output via context
injection (Result<Terminal, Output>).

events.name: credit_approved
events.description: dispatched by validating_credit invoke when credit passes

events.name: credit_rejected
events.description: dispatched by validating_credit invoke when credit fails

events.name: submit_for_underwriting
events.description: trigger that runs underwriting child synchronously

invariants:
A rejected_at_credit application cannot return to validating_credit:
it must be resubmitted as a new application with a new id.

submit_for_underwriting is only legal from ready_for_underwriting.
The model enforces this structurally: the transition with the
invoke has from: ready_for_underwriting and no other source.
open_points:
State invoke on validating_credit currently does not declare
assign on the on_completion entries: the child output (score,
max_credit_limit) is captured by the target code into the
parent's private context outside the YAML. A future schema
revision may allow assign also on state-invoke on_completion;
for now it is documental in the implementation guide.
